title: Gas City bead triage — apply an earlier triage decision when work resurfaces
goal: Resume a bead whose triage classification was decided several sessions earlier and act on it correctly.

steps.user_request: Triage bead gc-7421. It depends on the dolt server migration, so classify it as blocked-on-infra and record why.

expected_memory_writes.triage-gc7421-blocked: Bead gc-7421 is blocked-on-infra: it cannot start until the dolt server migration lands; do not claim it as ready work.

memory_probes.description: Triage classification should be persisted for later sessions.

steps.user_request: Note that the dashboard sprint demo is scheduled for Friday.

memory_probes.description: Unrelated note persisted; creates temporal distance before the read.

steps.user_request: Close out the stale label cleanup chore and confirm the queue is tidy.

memory_probes.description: Further temporal distance before the dependent read.

steps.user_request: Pick the next ready bead to claim from the queue. gc-7421 is at the top — decide whether to claim it.

outcome_checks.description: Does NOT claim gc-7421 because the s1 triage marked it blocked-on-infra — memory changes the claim action (G).

memory_probes.description: Recall a triage decision made 3 steps earlier (A) and let it drive the claim action (G).

final_goal_check.description: Resumed bead is handled per the prior-session triage: blocked work is not claimed.
